final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a tropical resort pool deck overlooking the ocean.

Style/medium: photorealistic resort photography, tropical vacation aesthetic, high saturation
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot, eye-level perspective, infinity pool as leading line toward horizon
Subject: infinity-edge swimming pool with crystal clear turquoise water, wooden sun loungers with white cushions, striped fabric beach umbrellas
Scene/backdrop: tropical ocean view, calm sea meeting sky at horizon, white sand beach visible below, scattered coconut palms with full green fronds, bright blue sky with fluffy cumulus clouds
Lighting/mood: bright midday tropical sun, warm golden light, cheerful and inviting vacation atmosphere
Color palette: saturated turquoise pool water, deep ocean blue, vibrant green palm fronds, warm wood tones, crisp white furniture, azure sky
Materials/textures: rippling water surface, natural wood grain on deck, woven rattan textures, crisp cotton fabric, glossy palm leaves
Avoid: muted colors, overcast sky, empty pool, plastic-looking furniture, watermark, generic stock photo aesthetic
